assetGroup.name: Smart Contract
assetGroup.description:
**Network:** All smart contracts are deployed on **Polygon PoS** (Chain ID: 137). Only vulnerabilities affecting mainnet deployments are eligible.


### Critical Reward Calculation

**Mainnet assets:**

- Reward amount is 10% of the funds directly affected up to a maximum of: **$5,000,000**
- Minimum reward to discourage security researchers from withholding a bug report: **$50,000**

contracts.name: ConditionalTokens
contracts.description: Gnosis Conditional Tokens Framework (ERC1155). Manages all prediction market position tokens — condition preparation, position splitting/merging, payout reporting, and redemption. Uses ECMH for collection ID derivation. Holds all collateral backing positions. **Third-party contract: only vulnerabilities arising from Polymarket's integration patterns are in scope.**

contracts.name: FeeModule
contracts.description: Fee proxy that intercepts order matching, delegates to CTFExchange, and handles maker fee refunds based on BPS calculations. Admin-only matchOrders() and withdrawFees().

contracts.name: NegRiskAdapter
contracts.description: Core adapter for multi-outcome (negative risk) markets. Manages YES/NO position conversion, collateral splitting/merging/redemption via WrappedCollateral. Routes fees to Vault.

contracts.name: NegRiskFeeModule
contracts.description: Fee module variant for NegRiskCtfExchange with ERC1155 approvals for NegRiskAdapter interaction.

contracts.name: NegRiskOperator
contracts.description: Permissioned operator for market preparation, question resolution, and dispute flagging. Prevents multiple TRUE resolutions per market.

contracts.name: NegRiskUmaCtfAdapter
contracts.description: UmaCtfAdapter instance configured for NegRisk markets. Same codebase as UmaCtfAdapter.

contracts.name: NegRiskWrappedCollateral
contracts.description: RC20 wrapper around USDC.e enabling the NegRiskAdapter to manage collateral separately from ConditionalTokens. Permissionless unwrap; owner-restricted mint/burn.

contracts.name: ProxyFactory
contracts.description: Deploys deterministic (CREATE2) proxy wallets for Polymarket users. Integrates with Gas Station Network for relay functionality.

contracts.name: SafeFactory
contracts.description: eploys deterministic Gnosis Safe proxies for Polymarket users. EIP-712 signature verification for proxy creation.

contracts.name: UmaCtfAdapter
contracts.description: Oracle adapter integrating UMA's Optimistic Oracle for market resolution. Handles initialization, data requests, dispute escalation (2-hour proposal period, DVM escalation), and CTF condition resolution.

contracts.name: CollateralToken
contracts.description: UUPS upgradeable ERC20 (pUSD, 6 decimals). Wraps USDC/USDC.e. Role-based access: MINTER_ROLE for mint/burn, WRAPPER_ROLE for wrap/unwrap. Both proxy contract and implementation contract are in scope.

contracts.name: CollateralOnramp
contracts.description: Wraps USDC/USDC.e into pUSD (CollateralToken). Admin-gated with pausable per-asset functionality.

contracts.name: CollateralOfframp
contracts.description: Unwraps pUSD back to USDC/USDC.e. Admin-gated with pausable per-asset functionality.

contracts.name: PermissionedRamp
contracts.description: EIP-712 witness-signed wrap/unwrap for CollateralToken. Uses nonces for replay protection and deadline-based expiry.

contracts.name: CTFExchangeV2
contracts.description: V2 exchange with optimized assembly (EIP-712 hashing, event emission, address derivation). Three settlement paths: COMPLEMENTARY (P2P), MINT (split), MERGE. Adds UserPausable, preapproved orders, and builder metadata.

contracts.name: NegRiskCtfExchangeV2
contracts.description: V2 exchange variant for negative risk markets. Same as CTFExchangeV2 with pre-approved NegRiskAdapter interactions.

contracts.name: Vault
contracts.description: ERC20/ERC1155 token vault for protocol fees collected by NegRiskAdapter. Admin-controlled transfer functions.

contracts.name: CtfCollateralAdapter (Address 1)
contracts.description: Bridges pUSD and CTF for standard markets. Unwraps pUSD to USDC.e for CTF split operations, wraps back on merge. Pausable per-asset.

contracts.name: CtfCollateralAdapter (Address 2)
contracts.description: Bridges pUSD and CTF for standard markets. Unwraps pUSD to USDC.e for CTF split operations, wraps back on merge. Pausable per-asset.

contracts.name: NegRiskCtfCollateralAdapter (Address 1)
contracts.description: Extends CtfCollateralAdapter for negative risk markets. Adds NO to YES position conversion via NegRiskAdapter.

contracts.name: NegRiskCtfCollateralAdapter (Address 2)
contracts.description: Extends CtfCollateralAdapter for negative risk markets. Adds NO to YES position conversion via NegRiskAdapter.

contracts.name: DepositWallet (Implementation)
contracts.description: UUPS-upgradeable smart-contract wallet (logic contract) behind per-user ERC-1967 proxies deployed by the factory. Supports EIP-712 signed batch execution (owner or session signer), ERC-1271 signature validation, two-step ownership transfers, an owner-controlled pause + timelock for emergency asset recovery, and factory-gated UUPS upgrades.

contracts.name: DepositWalletFactory (Implementation)
contracts.description: Factory logic contract behind the UUPS proxy. Deterministically deploys DepositWallet ERC-1967 proxies (via Solady LibClone) and proxies signed batch executions into them. Three-tier role model (Owner / Admin / Operator) on Solady OwnableRoles; maintains an authorizedImplementation mapping gating wallet deployments and upgrades.

contracts.name: DepositWalletFactory (Proxy)
contracts.description: User-facing ERC-1967 proxy holding all factory state. UUPS upgrades restricted to the factory owner. Both this proxy and the implementation (DepositWalletFactory (Implementation)) are in scope.

contracts.name: PositionManager
contracts.description: ERC1155 PositionManager that mints/burns user positions on behalf of registered modules and encodes module routing directly in each position ID.

contracts.name: CombinatorialModule
contracts.description: Multi-leg conjunction module (moduleId=3) handling split, merge, refinement, extraction, compression, redemption, and wrap/unwrap of combinatorial positions.

contracts.name: Exchange
contracts.description: EIP-712 order-matching exchange with direct-to-module mint/merge transfers; supports EOA, ERC-1271, POLY_PROXY, and POLY_GNOSIS_SAFE signatures.

contracts.name: BinaryModule
contracts.description: YES/NO binary-market module (moduleId=1) handling split/merge/redeem, oracle payout reporting, and the legacy CTF→V2 binary migration path.

contracts.name: NegRiskModule
contracts.description: Negative-risk multi-outcome module (moduleId=2) supporting horizontal split/merge and NO→YES conversion across event conditions, plus legacy NegRiskAdapter→V2 migration.

contracts.name: Router
contracts.description: User-facing split/merge/redeem router (and NegRisk horizontal entry points) using the pre-transfer pattern to mint/burn directly through modules.

contracts.name: AutoRedeemer
contracts.description: Batch auto-redemption helper that lets authorised operators redeem resolved V2 and legacy CTF/NegRiskAdapter positions on behalf of users that have approved this contract.

contracts.name: Perps ExchangeV1
contracts.description: Polymarket perpetuals exchange v1 state root commit and fund management contract
